mapper.select: SELECT id, openid, phone, nickname, avatar_url, role, status, create_time, update_time FROM user WHERE phone = #{phone} LIMIT 1
SELECT id, openid, phone, nickname, avatar_url, role, status, create_time, update_time FROM user WHERE id = #{id} LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user(openid, phone, nickname, avatar_url, role, status) VALUES(#{openid}, #{phone}, #{nickname}, #{avatarUrl}, #{role}, #{status})
